data.title: Elizabeth Warren Challenger Joins Others In Opposing Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Storage Stance: Nothing More American Than The Right To Self Custody
data.description: A controversial take on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) self-custody by MicroStrategy CEO Michael Saylor has riled up privacy advocates, prompting disagreements and counter-arguments.

data.title: Bill Gates Makes $50M Private Donation To Kamala Harris' Campaign After Years Of Political Silence: 'This Election Is Different,' Says Billionaire
data.description: Bill Gates, the co-founder of Microsoft Corp, has reportedly made a substantial donation to a non-profit organization supporting Vice President Kamala Harris's presidential campaign.

Cat Victory Over Dogs? Popcat Rally Defies Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Decline, Coin's YTD Gains Skyrocket 15344%
data.description: Cat-themed Popcat (POPCAT) shrugged off declines in the meme coin space to emerge as one of the market's biggest gainers on Tuesday.
